personal.name: Sanya Jaiswal
personal.tagline: Crafting digital experiences with code & creativity.
personal.bio: I am a passionate Computer Science student and fullstack developer who loves building beautiful, functional web experiences. I thrive on clean code, intuitive design, and pushing my limits through every project.

projects.name: Local Food Business Directory
description: Built a web-based directory platform to help users discover and connect with nearby food businesses.
Integrated a backend system for managing business listings, customer info, and reviews.
Improved search relevance by 85% using location-based recommendations.

projects.name: Secure System Call Interface
description: Designed a secure simulator for system calls with user authentication and access control.
Developed role-based login using ACLs to prevent unauthorized access.
Reduced unauthorized access risks by 40% and improved audit transparency.

training.name: DSA with C++
training.description: Implemented Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues, Trees, Graphs. Improved code efficiency by 30%.

extras: Contributed to community environmental initiatives including tree plantation campaigns.
Supported coordination of volunteer teams during environmental campaigns.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.description: Creating intuitive, beautiful interfaces that users love to interact with.

services.title: Fullstack Development
services.description: End-to-end web applications from frontend to backend.

services.title: Problem Solving
services.description: Algorithmic thinking and DSA expertise for efficient solutions.

services.title: Open Source
services.description: Contributing to and building tools that make developers' lives easier.
